table_summary: Detailed records of foreign exchange (FX) swap transactions, including deal identifiers, customer and product information, transaction dates, currencies, rates, amounts, interest, revaluation, and profit/loss details for each swap leg.

column_descriptions.description: Date (YYYY-MM-DD) when the transaction record was created or updated. Used for filtering and tracking transaction history.
Text code uniquely identifying the FX swap deal. Used to group or reference all records related to a specific deal.
Text code uniquely identifying the swap leg or component within a deal. Distinguishes different legs or parts of a swap.
Text code representing the primary account involved in the swap. Used for account-level reporting and reconciliation.
Text code for the counterparty or swap account involved in the transaction. Used to track the other side of the swap.
Text code uniquely identifying the customer involved in the swap transaction.
Full name of the customer (text, possibly in Mongolian script) participating in the swap.
Text code for the financial product associated with the swap (e.g., product type or series).
Descriptive name of the product involved in the swap (text, possibly in Mongolian).
Text label indicating the type or category of the product (e.g., swap, forward, etc.).
Text field providing additional details or notes about the swap transaction.
Numeric identifier for the dealer or staff member who handled the swap transaction.
Full name of the dealer or staff member responsible for the transaction (text, possibly in Mongolian).
Text label indicating the current status of the deal (e.g., active, closed, pending).
Single-character code indicating whether the leg is a 'buy' (B) or 'sell' (S) side of the swap.
Text code for the currency being bought in this leg of the swap (e.g., 'USD', 'MNT', 'JPY'). Determines the currency for all 'buy' amount columns.
Text code for the currency being sold in this leg of the swap. Determines the currency for all 'sell' amount columns.
Numeric value representing the exchange rate applied to the currency being bought. The rate is quoted in terms of the buy currency.
Numeric value representing the exchange rate applied to the currency being sold. The rate is quoted in terms of the sell currency.
Date (YYYY-MM-DD) when the swap deal was agreed or executed.
Date (YYYY-MM-DD) when the buy leg of the swap is settled or effective.
Date (YYYY-MM-DD) when the sell leg of the swap is settled or effective.
Numeric value representing the amount of currency being sold in this leg of the swap. The currency is specified by the 'sell_cur_code' column.
Numeric value representing the amount of currency being bought in this leg of the swap. The currency is specified by the 'buy_cur_code' column.
Numeric value indicating the agreed exchange rate for the swap deal as a whole.
Numeric value representing the prevailing market exchange rate at the time of the deal.
Numeric value representing the margin (profit or buffer) in the swap deal, typically in the base or reporting currency.
Numeric value representing the profit or loss realized from the swap transaction, typically in the base or reporting currency.
Numeric value indicating the interest rate applied to the currency given (lent) in the swap.
Numeric value indicating the interest rate applied to the currency taken (borrowed) in the swap.
Numeric value representing the outstanding balance of the bought currency. The currency is specified by 'buy_cur_code'.
Numeric value representing the outstanding balance of the sold currency. The currency is specified by 'sell_cur_code'.
Numeric value representing the balance of interest to be paid on the currency given (lent). Currency context depends on the swap leg.
Numeric value representing the balance of interest to be received on the currency taken (borrowed). Currency context depends on the swap leg.
Numeric value for the interest amount received. The currency is typically determined by the swap leg context.
Numeric value for the interest amount paid. The currency is typically determined by the swap leg context.
Numeric value for the billed (invoiced) interest to be received. Currency context as above.
Numeric value for the billed (invoiced) interest to be paid. Currency context as above.
Numeric value representing the revaluation adjustment for assets due to currency fluctuations. Currency is typically the reporting currency.
Numeric value representing the revaluation adjustment for liabilities due to currency fluctuations. Currency is typically the reporting currency.
Numeric value representing the income from revaluation adjustments. Currency is typically the reporting currency.
Numeric value representing the expense from revaluation adjustments. Currency is typically the reporting currency.
Numeric value representing the off-balance (possibly settled or closed) amount of the bought currency. Currency is specified by 'buy_cur_code'.
Numeric value representing the off-balance (possibly settled or closed) amount of the sold currency. Currency is specified by 'sell_cur_code'.
Numeric value indicating the leg number or sequence within the swap deal. Used to distinguish multiple legs in complex swaps.
Numeric value representing the number of days remaining until the swap matures or is settled.
Date (YYYY-MM-DD) when the last revaluation of the swap position was performed.
